# debugDescription

**Instance Property**

A text representation of the recommender algorithm that’s suitable for output during debugging.

## Declaration

```swift
var debugDescription: String { get }
```

## Algorithm descriptions

- **description**: A text representation of the recommender algorithm.
- **playgroundDescription**: A description of the recommender algorithm shown in a playground.
